Appearances:
Plaintiff, Paul Gaviria is present. Represented by
Plaintiff is in pro per.
Defendant, Rudy Ramirez, Cristina Vinoya and Chona Ramirez, are present.
Attorney, Grace Tong , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Donald Sullivan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-16-2010 is vacated.
